main_text:
Game 2 Final Score: Warriors 122, Cavaliers 103 | Warriors leads series 2-0 | Series Hub
The Lede: Stephen Curry scored 33, hitting an NBA Finals record nine 3-pointers to lead the Warriors to a 2-0 lead. Kevin Durant added 26 points to go with nine rebounds and seven assists while Klay Thompson added 20 points playing on a tender left leg. LeBron James followed up his 51-point performance in Game 1 with 29 points, 13 assists and nine rebounds.
